case_title: SMANTHA LOPEZ VS. FAO SCHWARZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, SMANTHA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWARZ, FAO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-20-2003
